Document:
# Roleplay Rule 5 - Play a Believable Character
Remember to treat the game like a round of DND, try to make a believable character and stick with it. Charaters cannot be named after real life people, or be a parody of a real life person. Charaters also should not be names that are unacceptable or inappropriate. If you are unsure if a name is acceptable, ask an admin.
## Examples
### Permitted
- Making a unique personality and sticking to it. - Making a boring personality and sticking to it.
### Not Permitted
- Acting completely goddamn insame for no reason. - Having a peronality that causes nothing but issues for other people as a non-antagonist. - Don't make your entire personality "completely insufferable" - Character names or usernames which are unacceptable or inappropriate. - A character that is a parody or similar to someone in real life or a famous character.
